top_signals.title: ECB’s Rehn Says Energy Shock Has Been ‘Clearly Stagflationary’
top_signals.summary: European Central Bank Governing Council member Olli Rehn said the conflict in the Middle East is stoking inflation while weighing on economic expansion. Rehn spoke with Francine Lacqua on Tuesday in Sintra, Portugal. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Sable Sinks 55% as Oil Driller Struggles to Repay Exxon Loan
top_signals.summary: Sable Offshore Corp., briefly buoyed by a Trump administration push to boost oil production off the California coast, lost roughly half its market value after it turned to equity and bond investors to repay debt owed to Exxon Mobil Corp.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: The AI boom is colliding with a new threat: Severe weather
top_signals.summary: Heatwaves and severe weather are raising risks for AI data centers, from grid strain to higher insurance and repair costs.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: The Afghanistan Reckoning
top_signals.summary: Forever wars and the costs of collective forgetting.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Greenland Resources gets $5M Canadian funding for Malmbjerg molybdenum mine
top_signals.summary: Canada becomes the first G7 nation to invest in mining in Greenland, the company said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Do you really, really love your job? Then you're not alone, according to surprising results from this survey
top_signals.summary: Those surveyed showed a 78.9% rate of workers who "reported feeling positive at the end of their shifts."

top_signals.title: Rosh Pinah commissions new SAG mill as mine expansion nears completion
top_signals.summary: The mill represents the final major processing component of the mine's planned expansion.
